---
id: upload-shortcuts
title: "Upload shortcuts"
description: "Creates glean shortcuts for uploaded shortcuts info. Glean would host the shortcuts, and they can be managed in the knowledge tab once uploaded."
sidebar_label: "Upload shortcuts"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/indexing-api/glean-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/index/v1/uploadshortcuts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates glean shortcuts for uploaded shortcuts info. Glean would host the shortcuts, and they can be managed in the knowledge tab once uploaded.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
